description: A Chinese ink-wash painting depicting an elderly man with a thin mustache and goatee, wearing a dark cap and simple white tunic, seated atop a dark donkey in motion. The donkey strides to the left with its head lowered. The rendering is loose and fluid with bold black ink strokes for the donkey and lighter washes for the rider. Chinese calligraphy and red seal stamps appear along the right edge and left side of the composition. The background is plain white paper.
